positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a lone, silhouetted astronaut drifting through a vibrant nebula. The astronaut is equipped with retro-futuristic gear, surrounded by abstract cosmic dust rendered in deep purples, magentas, electric blues, and pops of gold. Focus on high contrast and clean lines; the nebula should have a watercolor wash texture but maintain distinct, graphic shapes. Composition should be centered, filling the frame with deep space drama. Style: Abstract, neo-retro sci-fi, vector art inspired, strong halftone patterns, ultra-clean print quality. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, deformed, extra fingers, cluttered, photorealistic, photo, drawing, sketch
